ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the player */,
  "player_email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "player_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "player_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "player_profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., singles, doubles, team) */,
  "tournament_location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournaments" (
  "player_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tournament participation */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points accumulated by the player in the tournament */,
  "total_breaks_regulatory" INTEGER /* Total regulatory breaks taken by the player */,
  "total_breaks_warning" INTEGER /* Total warning breaks taken by the player */,
  "qualification_status" TEXT /* Qualification status of the player (e.g., qualified, eliminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "round_format" TEXT /* Format of the round (e.g., group stage, knockout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rounds" (
  "player_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-round performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "round_result" TEXT /* Result of the player in the round (e.g., W10, L9) */,
  "round_points" REAL /* Points accumulated by the player in the round */,
  "round_breaks_regulatory" INTEGER /* Regulatory breaks taken by the player in the round */,
  "round_breaks_warning" INTEGER /* Warning breaks taken by the player in the round */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "opponent_result" TEXT /* Result of the opponent in the round (e.g., W10, L9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rounds_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rounds_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "prize_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for which the prize is awarded */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Amount of the prize */,
  "prize_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the prize */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prizes_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the user role (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bracket */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "bracket_name" TEXT /* Name of the bracket */,
  "bracket_type" TEXT /* Type of the bracket (e.g., winner, loser) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_brackets_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_players" (
  "match_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-player participation */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., W10, L9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
